advisory.title: Heartbeat context inheritance bypasses sandbox via senderIsOwner escalation
advisory.description:
## Summary

Heartbeat context inheritance bypasses sandbox via `senderIsOwner` escalation.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix

Fixed by commit `a30214a624946fc5c85c9558a27c1580172374fd` (`fix(heartbeat): block owner-only auth inheritance for exec events`).

introducingCommits.subject: fix(gateway): revoke active sessions on token rotation (#57646)

timeline.notes: This case uses the immediate parent of fix commit a30214a624946fc5c85c9558a27c1580172374fd as the last known vulnerable snapshot. Exact introduction commit mapping is still pending.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should detect sandboxescape when scanning vulnerableHead. This case uses the last known vulnerable pre-fix commit pending exact introduction mapping.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_is_fix_parent
checks.details: Using parent 91f7a6b0fd67b703897e6e307762d471ca09333d of fix commit a30214a624946fc5c85c9558a27c1580172374fd as the last known vulnerable commit.

checks.name: baseline_precedes_vulnerable_head
checks.details: Using direct parent bd957a3a8b46976724570936bc37e052d4ec2fc5 of vulnerableHead 91f7a6b0fd67b703897e6e307762d471ca09333d as a temporary baseline until exact introduction mapping is completed.
